# go-dblog

`go-dblog` is a multi-module Go library for parsing database change logs and
adapting them to a shared event API.

## Modules

- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog`: common registry, event, checkpoint, filter,
  and flashback contracts.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/mysql`: MySQL-family binlog parser and
  replication stream reader.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/postgres`: PostgreSQL logical decoding text
  parser, SQL slot reader, and wire-level replication reader for `test_decoding`.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/mongo`: MongoDB oplog/change stream JSON
  parser and live change stream reader.
- `github.com/Infranite/go-dblog/redis`: Redis AOF RESP parser and replication
  stream reader.

## Key Files

- `README.md`: feature overview, examples, backend package layout, inline pull
  request guidance, versioning policy, and roadmap pointer.
- `ROADMAP.md`: version targets, capability matrix, workstreams, and versioning
  rules.
- `doc/doc_zh.md`: Chinese project documentation.
- GitHub Releases and Git tags: public release record; git history is the
  detailed change log.
- `SECURITY.md`: vulnerability reporting policy.

There are no standalone `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `RELEASE.md`, or `CHANGELOG.md`
files; those topics are handled by `README.md`, GitHub Releases, and git
history.

No public tags have been published yet. The current public target is the
`v0.1.0` tag set with root tag `v0.1.0` and backend tags `mysql/v0.1.0`,
`postgres/v0.1.0`, `mongo/v0.1.0`, and `redis/v0.1.0`.

## Checks

```bash
make lint
make test
make fuzz-smoke
make bench-smoke
```

Run fixture-backed integration tests when Docker is available:

```bash
make integration
```
